block_02: Los Angeles-based manufacturer of plant-based meat substitutes can now be traded on the IQ Option platform. Beyond Meat went public on May 2. That day, BYND stock skyrocketed 163%, becoming the best IPO of 2019.
block_03: Investors have already expressed their interest in Beyond Meat: its share price has demonstrated an impressive 58% increase over the course of only one month.
block_04: What the future holds for Beyond Meat?
